channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo Buys US$34 Million Gulfstream G550 Private Jet @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo Shows Off New US$34 Million Gulfstream G550 Jet Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo has announced the purchase of a new Gulfstream G550 private jet, saying the luxury aircraft will soon arrive in Zimbabwe. Chivayo shared the news on his Facebook account on Fr via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Delta Corporation, ZIMRA tax dispute hits US$97 million
item.description: Delta Corporation and its associate, African Distillers (Afdis), are facing cumulative tax assessments from the Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA) totalling approximately US$97 million, up from US$73 million last year. The US$24 million increase is largely linked to the 2021 tax via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Delta Corporation, ZIMRA tax dispute hits US$97 million
item.description: Delta Corporation and its associate, African Distillers (Afdis), are facing cumulative tax assessments from the Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA) totalling approximately US$97 million, up from US$73 million last year. The US$24 million increase is largely linked to the 2021 tax via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: South Africa applauds Zimbabwe’s Beitbridge Border upgrade plans
item.description: Channel Africa South Africa (SA) has commended Zimbabwe’s efforts to modernise the Beitbridge Border Post, describing plans to expand the crossing infrastructure as critical to improving regional trade and easing congestion at Africa’s busiest land border. The SA and Zimbabwe Bi- via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: South Africa applauds Zimbabwe’s Beitbridge Border upgrade plans
item.description: Channel Africa South Africa (SA) has commended Zimbabwe’s efforts to modernise the Beitbridge Border Post, describing plans to expand the crossing infrastructure as critical to improving regional trade and easing congestion at Africa’s busiest land border. The SA and Zimbabwe Bi- via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabweans lured into Russia’s war as families plead for their return
item.description: Al Jazeera Elvis Sitshela remains deeply unsettled by the sudden departure of his brother, Dumisani, to Russia in early 2026. Dumisani left in complete secrecy, without telling the family, until a shocking text arrived from an international number. “Hi, brother, I am in Russia no via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chief Justice Malaba bows out, but term extension controversy will define his legacy @zimsituation
item.description: Malaba retires to what Deputy Chief Justice Gwaunza described as two great passions: reading and ranching Source: Chief Justice Malaba bows out, but term extension controversy will define his legacy – Zimbabwe News Now Deputy Chief Justice Elizabeth Gwaunza, Chief Justice Luke Ma via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.description: Tapiwa Chirume ZIMBABWEANS have just smashed a 28-year Chibuku Super record! With a record 4.62 million hectolitres of the much loved brew... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Nyaradzo Buys Glen Forest Cemetery, Plans Luxury-Style Memorial Park In Harare
item.description: Nyaradzo Buys Glen Forest Cemetery, Unveils Luxury-Style Memorial Park Plans Zimbabwe’s leading funeral assurance company, The Nyaradzo Group, has bought Glen Forest Cemetery and announced plans to transform it into the new Sahwira Glen Forest Memorial Park, a modern memorial est via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Teenage Hadebe’s Staggering US Salary Makes Him One Of Zimbabwe’s Best-Paid Players
item.description: Teenage Hadebe: How Much The Warriors Defender Earns In The US Zimbabwe Warriors defender Teenage Hadebe is earning millions in the United States after his Major League Soccer (MLS) salary details were revealed in the league’s 2026 salary guide. The figures released by the Major via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
